'''Redlio''' was a female [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|huntress]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].

{{Char-stub}}
